_source: Fixture rule set for test_llm_indicator_extract.py. Three report-type rules on balance_sheet with different report_type values, used to exercise form-compat filtering (_form_compatible) across all four periodic forms and the one-LLM-call-per-section contract. Loaded via indicators_client.set_registry_path.

rules.name: 负债合计
rules.note: annual-only report rule — skipped for 半年报/季报

rules.name: 营业收入
rules.note: report rule with no report_type — defaults to broadly applicable
